name: Claude Opus 4.1
note: Incremental Opus 4 upgrade improving agentic coding, refactoring and reasoning benchmarks; drop-in replacement at same price.

results.notes: SWE-bench Verified, up from 72.5% on Opus 4; confirmed via direct fetch of InfoQ article

Terminal-bench; original InfoQ sourceUrl did not contain this figure in extracted text (only SWE-bench and safety metrics were present), so sourceUrl swapped to Winbuzzer, which explicitly lists 43.3%
AIME 2025, up from 75.5% on Opus 4; same sourceUrl correction as Terminal-bench row, confirmed 78.0% on Winbuzzer
GPQA Diamond, up from 79.6% on Opus 4; same sourceUrl correction, confirmed 80.9% on Winbuzzer

TAU-bench Retail domain score, filed under 'tau-bench' per this corpus's existing convention (see claude-opus-4.json, claude-sonnet-4.json) of recording the Retail split under this slug; Airline 56.0% from the same table omitted to avoid a duplicate-key collision.
Multilingual MMLU, averaged over 14 non-English languages, per the launch page's official benchmark table.
MMMU (validation split), visual reasoning, from the same official launch-page table.

Terminal-bench 2.0 (the harder, second-generation suite — distinct from the classic Terminal-Bench 43.3% already recorded for Opus 4.1). This retroactive re-evaluation of Opus 4.1 only appears in Claude Opus 4.5's Nov-2025 launch page/system card comparison table, not on Opus 4.1's own original Aug-2025 launch page (Terminal-Bench 2.0 didn't exist yet at that time).

OSWorld-Verified computer-use score for Opus 4.1, likewise only published retroactively in Claude Opus 4.5's Nov-2025 system card/launch comparison table (Opus 4.1's own launch page did not test computer use). [benchmarkSlug corrected during round-5 full-corpus accuracy re-verify: osworld-verified -> osworld, same score]
Princeton HAL 'HAL Generalist Agent' scaffold, standard (non-High-thinking) config, Claude Opus 4.1 (Aug 2025 snapshot). GAIA validation set.

Live Text Arena leaderboard, model row 'claude-opus-4-1-20250805' (non-thinking-tagged variant, matching this corpus record's single isDefaultConfig/isBestConfig entry), Elo 1447 (rank 56/374, 77,265 votes) as of the Jul 13, 2026 snapshot fetched directly from arena.ai. A separate 'claude-opus-4-1-20250805-thinking-16k' row (Elo 1449) also exists but was not used since this corpus record does not track a distinct extended-thinking config. Not previously tracked for this model.

verificationNotes: Real model, confirmed via anthropic.com/news/claude-opus-4-1 and Anthropic's X announcement (release 2025-08-05, same $15/$75 pricing as Opus 4, 200K context). SWE-bench 74.5% confirmed on InfoQ; the other 3 rows (Terminal-bench 43.3%, AIME 78%, GPQA 80.9%) were not literally present in the InfoQ text extraction, so sourceUrl was swapped to Winbuzzer's article, which explicitly lists all four figures. Per Anthropic's official model-deprecations page (fetched 2026-07-12): claude-opus-4-1-20250805 is currently 'Deprecated' (as of 2026-06-05) with tentative retirement 2026-08-05, which has NOT yet passed as of today (2026-07-12) — status='deprecated' and apiAvailable=true both confirmed correct as given.
